nodes.name: 📱 Trigger Telegram
nodes.notes: v0.6.0: Recebe SKUs via Telegram (texto ou arquivo .xlsx/.csv). Necessita configurar credenciais do bot (@BotFather).

nodes.name: ✅ Marcar PROCESSADO → CDP_SKUs
nodes.notes: Updates PROCESSADO/ENCONTRADO/NOTIFICADO=⏳ Processando for each dispatched sheet row, matched by row_number so duplicate CODIGO rows are initialized too.

nodes.name: 🔗 Emparelhar SKUs → PROCESSADO
nodes.notes: Pairs each HTTP response with Formatar batch by index; emits one item per SKU for all channels. Skips non-2xx responses.

nodes.name: ✅ API OK?
nodes.notes: Routes to success or error path based on API response status.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ items: $json.items, sites: $json.sites, callback_url: $json.callback_url, priority: $json.priority || 5, batch_group_id: $json.batch_group_id, chat_id: $json.chat_id, command_route: $json.command_route }) }}

nodes.name: 🚀 POST → Scraper API (/jobs)
nodes.notes: Requires CDP_SCRAPER_API_BASE and CDP_API_KEY. Batches POSTs (1 per 3s) to avoid API 500 under parallel load. Retries 3× on transient errors.

nodes.name: 🎲 Limitar SKUs
nodes.notes: All valid SKUs. Parallel router: [0] Scraper POST [1] confirm [2] API Diversos POST. batch_group_id shared.

nodes.name: ⚙️ Formatar Payload Scraper
nodes.notes: CDP v1.0: active default sites gm,ml,vw,eu,pecadireta; optional CDP_SCRAPER_SITES env can include melibox. Sends only supported API body fields and carries requester context in callback_url query params.

nodes.name: 🔍 DQ: Validar & Deduplicar
nodes.notes: v0.7.0: ORIGEM removed from per-SKU. notify_email/notify_phone read from E-MAIL/CONTATO columns. Routing via ad_hoc presence of chat_id/email_from only.

nodes.name: ⏰ Trigger Agendado (Seg 8h)
nodes.notes: Runs every Monday at 8am. Adjust cron as needed.

nodes.name: 📱 Roteador de Comando
nodes.notes: v4: routes .analisar, .sku text, .sku file, .sku both, .sku empty, .status/.andamento, ignore

nodes.name: 🔀 Switch Comando (Telegram)
nodes.notes: Routes: [0]analisar [1]sku_text [2]sku_file [3]sku_both [4]sku_empty [5]ignore [6]unauthorized [7]status

nodes.name: 📧 Roteador de Comando
nodes.notes: v4: Detects attachments in both simple mode (msg.attachments) and raw mode (msg.payload.parts[]) from Gmail Trigger. Passes message_id for downstream attachment download.

nodes.name: 🔀 Switch Comando (Email)
nodes.notes: Routes: [0]analisar [1]sku_text [2]sku_file [3]sku_both [4]sku_empty [5]ignore [6]unauthorized

nodes.name: 📱 Parsear SKUs do Telegram
nodes.notes: v3: receives pre-parsed text_skus from router

nodes.name: 📥 Obter Path do Arquivo (Telegram)
nodes.notes: v3: gets file path from Telegram API using file_id. Token fallback: TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN || TELEGRAM_TOKEN || TELEGRAM_API_TOKEN

nodes.name: 📥 Baixar Arquivo (Telegram)
nodes.notes: v3: downloads file bytes from Telegram CDN. continueOnFail keeps sku_both text path alive if download fails.

nodes.name: 📊 Parsear Planilha (Telegram)
nodes.notes: v3: parses XLSX/CSV binary from Telegram download into rows. continueOnFail avoids full route crash.

nodes.name: 📋 Formatar SKUs da Planilha (Telegram)
nodes.notes: v3: merges text_skus + file rows, deduped. handles sku_file and sku_both

nodes.name: 📧 Parsear SKUs do Email
nodes.notes: v3: receives pre-parsed text_skus from email router

nodes.name: 📥 Baixar Anexo (Email)
nodes.notes: v4: Uses message_id from router or Gmail Trigger id. Downloads all attachments as binary data for spreadsheet parser.

nodes.name: 📊 Parsear Planilha (Email)
nodes.notes: v3: parses XLSX/CSV binary from email attachment

nodes.name: 📋 Formatar SKUs da Planilha (Email)
nodes.notes: v3: merges text_skus + attachment rows, deduped

parameters.text:
⚠️ Depois de digitar o comando *.sku* coloque os códigos ou me envie uma planilha em anexo.

Exemplo:
`.sku ABC123 DEF456`
ou envie um arquivo *.xlsx* ou *.csv*

nodes.name: 📱 Resposta .sku Vazio (Telegram)
nodes.notes: v3: replies when .sku is sent without codes or file

parameters.subject: ⚠️ CDP: Comando .sku sem dados
parameters.message:
Após o comando .sku coloque os códigos separados por espaço ou vírgula, ou envie um arquivo .xlsx ou .csv em anexo.

Exemplo: .sku ABC123 DEF456 GHI789

nodes.name: 📧 Resposta .sku Vazio (Email)
nodes.notes: v3: replies when .sku is sent without codes or attachment

nodes.name: 📋 Formatar Confirmação (Planilha)
nodes.notes: Assistente CDP — única confirmação (após Limitar SKUs).

nodes.name: ✅ Foi Disparado por Comando?
nodes.notes: v3: skips notification when triggered by cron or manual

nodes.name: 📤 Router: API Diversos
nodes.notes: Router arm B: builds API Diversos POST body + callback with requester chat_id.

nodes.name: 🚀 POST API Diversos
nodes.notes: Inline POST to cdp-muv-api (avoids broken sub-workflow URL expressions on live).

nodes.name: 💾 Salvar Contexto do Solicitante
nodes.notes: v0.8.4: Persists chat_id/email_from in workflow staticData before 📊 Ler CDP_SKUs so ⚙️ Formatar Payload and 📋 Formatar Confirmação can recover routing after the sheet read.

nodes.name: 📊 Registrar Execução
nodes.notes: Phase 2: stores active run (job IDs, metadata) in workflow staticData after both API POSTs.

nodes.name: 📊 Status: preparar
nodes.notes: Phase 3: reads staticData active run, builds API poll URLs or 'no run' message.

nodes.name: 📊 GET Scraper Job
nodes.notes: Phase 3: GET /api/v1/jobs/{id} for scraper progress.

nodes.name: 📊 GET StokAPI Job
nodes.notes: Phase 3: GET /api/v1/muvstok/jobs/{id} for StokAPI progress.

nodes.name: 📊 Formatar Status
nodes.notes: Phase 3: combines scraper + StokAPI HTTP responses into PT-BR status message.

nodes.name: 📱 Enviar Status (Telegram)
nodes.notes: Phase 3: sends .status/.andamento progress reply to Telegram.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ batch_group_id: $json.batch_group_id, chat_id: $json.chat_id, command_route: $json.command_route, scraper_job_ids: $json.scraper_job_ids, stokapi_job_id: $json.stokapi_job_id, total_skus: $json.total_skus, estimated_seconds: $json.estimated_seconds, dispatched_at: $json.dispatched_at }) }}

nodes.name: 📊 GET dispatch run (chat)
nodes.notes: Phase 5: Postgres dispatch_runs fallback when staticData is empty.
